highlights:
Director, Head of Enterprise Services AI and Analytics
...
Director, Enterprise AI and Analytics at [PPL Corporation](https://www.linkedin.com/company/ppl-corporation)
...
As a seasoned technology leader with more than 25 years of expertise in data, advanced analytics, and enterprise IT, I specialize in delivering innovative, data-driven solutions that empower teams, enhance operational efficiency, and generate measurable business results. I am deeply committed to responsible AI, team growth, and fostering a culture of continuous improvement. Currently, I oversee AI and analytics initiatives for enterprise services, with a primary focus on transforming business operations through automation, predictive insights, and GenAI-powered solutions. My work spans leading digital transformation and AI adoption, designing and implementing advanced analytics capabilities that optimize processes, and championing operational excellence in dynamic, fast-paced environments. Equally important, I build and mentor high-performing teams with expertise in data and technology integration, ensuring they are equipped to drive strategic impact across the organization. I collaborate closely with senior leadership and stakeholders to align IT strategy with business objectives, while advocating for responsible AI practices and cross-functional partnerships that maximize organizational value.

results.title: R&D Business Intern – Fall 2026 (14849) – University of Rhode Island | Center for Career & Experiential Education
highlights:
PPL Corporation
...
# R&D Business Intern – Fall 2026 (14849)
...
The PPL R&D Department is looking for business and/or social sciences interns to begin in August 2026 who are passionate about renewable energy, including wind and solar, energy storage, sustainability, carbon capture, and other decarbonization technologies.
...
Ideal candidates will be based in Pennsylvania, Rhode Island, or Kentucky. During the school year, students will work part time, but during the summer, work would be on-site and could include travel to attend R&D meetings at numerous locations across the PPL Corporation including Allentown Pennsylvania, Providence Rhode Island, as well as Louisville and Lexington Kentucky. While traveling, all expenses will be paid.
...

...

...

...
- Supports evaluation of business, regulatory, legislative, and market frameworks impacting renewable energy and decarbonization initiatives.
...

...
- Identifies opportunities for improvement and/or suggests improved methods.
...

- Available part time during the semester and full time during the Summer
- Minimum 3.00 GPA, 3.50 preferred

### Seq2Seq Neural Machine Translation Framework: English-French Translation with Bidirectional GRUs in Keras
...
Objective: Build a deep learning model to translate English text into French using Keras and TensorFlow. Data Preprocessing: Tokenization: Convert text into integer sequences where each unique word is represented by a unique integer. Padding: Ensure all sequences have the same length by adding padding tokens to shorter sequences. Model Architecture: Embedding Layer: Maps integer indices to dense vectors, capturing semantic information of words. Bidirectional GRU: Processes input sequences in both forward and backward directions to capture contextual information. RepeatVector: Repeats the context vector to match the length of the target sequence. TimeDistributed Dense: Applies a dense layer across each time step to predict the next word in the sequence. Training: Loss Function: Measures the difference between the predicted and actual word distributions. Optimizer: Adjusts model weights to minimize the loss function using the Adam optimization algorithm. Evaluation: The model translates English sentences into French by generating word sequences based on the learned patterns. Outputs are decoded from integer sequences back to readable text using the tokenizer. Show less

We are currently looking for an AI / ML Engineer in the United States.This role sits at the intersection of machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making, focused on solving complex challenges in the energy and utility sector. You will contribute to the development of advanced AI and ML solutions that combine predictive modeling, optimization, and generative AI to support critical infrastructure and sustainability goals. Working closely with data scientists and software engineers, you will help design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems that power real-world applications. The environment is highly collaborative and innovation-driven, with a strong emphasis on applied AI, production readiness, and measurable impact. results.title: Rommel Dumlao
highlights:
Designed and develop an educational application in IOS using AI services like image and voice recognition. Developed an educational virtual reality game on the Oculus Rift platform which retrieves data and pictures from the cloud and renders them on the VR environment using C# and Unity game engine. The enemies use Artificial Intelligence (AI) to navigate throughout the scene. Developed a web portal for an educational virtual reality game using HTML, Javascript and CSS. The portal lets users customize the questions and upload pictures that are rendered on the VR environment using Azure Function Apps, Azure Storage and Cosmos DB. Developed an automation that will automatically update prices on an e-commerce website from the supplier website using UIPath. The "bot" logs in to the supplier website to extract current prices and updates an Azure SQL database. Implemented an e-commerce site running on the cloud using an open-source solution in written in ASP.Net Core and C#. The solution uses plug and play architecture which supports themes and extensions and allows for future customization and enhancements without modifying the base open-source code. Developed a responsive website that uses the latest JavaScript library (React JS) and added client-side features such as localization, ability to update themes, renders interactive graphs and geographic maps. Extended a popular open source learning management system written in Django web framework for Python (OpenEdx) and added Bitcoin payments as incentive when the learner has completed a milestone. In order to earn Bitcoin, the learner has to scan their QR code (Bitcoin public address) and save to their profile. Migrated MySQL, Redis and MongoDB running as containers into using Azure services. Wrote a Bitcoin Payment plugin for a popular open source e-commerce platform (nopCommerce) using ASP.Net core, C# and MySQL. The plugin used Coinbase APIs and Python backend services hosted in Azure API Management.
...
Researched guidelines on cloud migration, cloud security, cloud native design principles, cloud exit strategy and worked on a road map for migrating PPL’s application portfolio to the cloud. Integrated an intelligent virtual assistant with machine learning and natural language processing capabilities into PPL's interactive voice response system (IVR) using C#.Net which processed 25% of start and stop service requests. Integrated a software as a service (SaaS) solution which helps customers find and compare internet, TV and phone services in their area when electric service is started at PPL which resulted into 15% conversion rate using C#.Net. Worked in the development of an integrated system which provides a 360-degree view of customer data from different systems like customer service, outage management, payment information, business intelligence, multi-channel communications and work asset management using ASP.Net MVC, C# and PL/SQL. Modernized PPL's outage map using Javascript, CSS and C#.Net which generated more than 1 million hits annually and added additional features such as driving directions to free ice and water locations during a major storm. Implemented real time posting when payments are accepted at bill payment centers so customers don't need to call. Over 3,000 payments were processed real time on a daily basis. Lead the development of start, stop service on the web and automated manual tasks in the application for service workflow like credit check and requirement letters. This was a 1.5 million-dollar project which cut down the call time by 25% since 2012. The solution was written in C#.Net. Implemented a web replacement to a vendor check payment system and added enhanced customer search capability which eliminated the need for users to copy and paste information from 2 different systems using C#.Net and PL/SQL.

...
PPRG Holdings, LLC is building technology and AI systems to support the next generation of real estate operations, agent productivity, lead management, business automation, and customer experience.
...
We are looking for a highly motivated AI Engineering Intern to help us build practical AI tools, agents, local LLM workflows, and internal applications that can be used across our companies and teams.
...
We are hiring an intern to work directly on projects involving AI agents, agentic operating systems, local large language models, automation workflows, and application development.
...
The ideal candidate is curious, self-directed, and already experimenting with AI tools, LLMs, coding agents, automation, or app development. You do not need years of professional experience, but you should be able to show that you have built, tested, or explored technical projects on your own.
